title: killercam killer pack
description: a 1.21.8 to 26.1.2 pack with small changes  like red dark mode
body:
a **1.21.11** pack with small shild and totem and nice torchs to particles like removeing crystal explosions and makes the mod simple voice chat dark mode

and a glowing effect for totems

![A glowing effect for totems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3e432a4040986fbc1d6b64e99772aaa61e5ffd2.gif)






made by *justkillercam*
